notes: Budget split: clientPlanAmount (бюджет на осветителей) + new lightBudgetAmount (бюджет на свет) → clientTotal computed server-side via Decimal.plus, remainder clamped >=0. Crew calculator at /gaffer/crew-calculator auto-fills via ?crewAmount= query param. Use-as-client flow via ReturnToProjectBanner on contacts/[id]. Fixer commit 058ec30 closed all 6 re-review blockers: F1 form-state loss (sessionStorage draft on both new + edit), F2 duplicate 'Итого бюджет' (first grid cell renamed to 'К получению'), F5 grammar 'созданию проекта', F6 disabled CTA at total=0 with hint, #1 double-? URL bug (sep = includes('?') ? '&' : '?'), #2 open-redirect (startsWith('/gaffer/') guard on all 3 return paths — router.push, back Link, cancel Link). Schema: lightBudgetAmount Decimal @default(0) non-nullable with default, safe for prisma db push on existing rows.
